event_name: Moniteau County Fair - Senior Citizens Day
audience: General public with dedicated Senior Citizens Day at Centennial Hall; draws large 65+ crowd
tabling_details: Vendor Row Exhibits at fair; exhibitor inquiries to fair secretary. No refunds on contracts canceled after July 31.
cost: Contact fair board for vendor rates
notes: Fair July 20-24 confirmed. Senior Citizens Day historically held mid-week (Wednesday). 159th fair in 2025. Source also: californiademocrat.com

audience: General public; seniors 65+ receive discounted admission ($10 with ID)
tabling_details: Commercial vendor booths starting at $175/space; registration deadline July 5; $25 late fee after deadline; food vendors need COI.
cost: Starting at $175/space; $25 late fee after July 5
notes: Hours 5-10pm daily. Senior (65+) admission $10 with ID or $35 season pass. City of Columbia vendor license required.

audience: General community; county fair draws significant 60+ population
tabling_details: 2026 Fair Vendor Form at coopercountyfair.org; completed form emailed to Fair Board Treasurer who sends contract and payment details.
cost: Not listed; contact treasurer via website
notes: Dates July 21-25 confirmed. 2026 vendor form on website (returned 403 on direct fetch; contact scheduler for pricing).

audience: Seniors 60+
tabling_details: Resource/services tables 10:30am-1pm; orgs including Osage County Health Dept and Aging Best participate. Contact organizers to request a table.
cost: $5 suggested contribution 60+ / $7 under 60 (meal only); vendor cost unknown
notes: Recurring 4th Thursday monthly. Doors 10:30am; lunch 11am-1pm. Bingo; blood pressure checks; vision screenings. Co-sponsored by MRRL Osage County branch and Central MO Community Action.

event_name: Jefferson City Jaycees Cole County Fair
audience: General community including families and seniors
tabling_details: Local business vendor booths available; contact fair directly for application and pricing.
notes: 76th Annual fair July 27-Aug 1; 5-11pm daily. Rides; food; live music. Facebook confirms local business vendor booths solicited.

audience: General community; arts and artisan festival attracts strong 55+ attendance; craft demos and live music on courthouse square

notes: Annual event Aug 1. Performances from Howard County Memorial Bandstand; artisan demos; food and beverage vendors. Sponsored by Fayette Area Heritage Association (FAHA). Vendor registration opens summer 2026.

audience: Adults 55+ / seniors; 30+ organizations offering resources for older adults

notes: confirmed
column22: Annual expo historically August (2023: Aug 4 at Callaway Christian Church; 2025: Oct 8 at YMCA). 2026 date estimated — confirm with United Way. Past coverage: fultonsun.com

audience: General public / rural community including senior 65+ population; county fair with food trucks and vendors
tabling_details: Vendors and food trucks present at fair. Contact fair directly at 573-619-0137 for exhibitor information and booth applications.
notes: Aug 12-15 2026. Wednesday: free admission with pageant; Thursday: carnival and concerts; Friday: livestock show and truck/tractor pull; Saturday: parade 11am. Source: mofairs.org/location/vienna

event_name: Missouri State Fair - Senior Appreciation Day (Aug 19)
audience: General public; dedicated Senior Appreciation Day Aug 19 for seniors 60+; 330000+ attendees over 11 days
tabling_details: Indoor booths $750-$1,100 (10x10); Outdoor $75-$105/front ft. Senior Appreciation Day Aug 19 features vendors in Mathewson Exhibition Center.
notes: Aug 13-23; Senior Appreciation Day is Aug 19. Senior Lounge 9am-6pm daily. BINGO; line dance; vision screenings; Missouri Waltz contest. Seniors 60+ get $2 off gate with Sedalia Democrat coupon.
